title: Creatify Agent Wave 2：从广告制作到全自动跨平台发布
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
Creatify Agent can now research a brand, direct the ad, and connect to Meta, TikTok and Google to launch it, all from a single conversation.
The agent leads the work and brings the marketer in at the checkpoints that matter: strategy, scripts, casting.
00:00
Creatify AI
@Creatify_AI
10h
Creatify Agent, Wave 2. You watched it make the ad. Now watch it run the whole campaign. It learns your brand. Directs a cinematic spot — no slop. Connects to Meta, TikTok, and Google, and launches on the date you pick. The agent didn't get an update. It got promoted. Drop your Show more
00:00
Paid partnership
6:11 PM · Jun 9, 2026 7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Creatify Agent Wave 2：从广告制作到全自动跨平台发布
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Creatify Agent 升级至 Wave 2。AI 智能体现在可通过单次对话完成品牌研究、广告导演，并直接连接 Meta、TikTok 和 Google 三大平台，按指定日期自动发布广告。智能体主导整个流程，仅在策略、脚本、选角等关键节点让营销人员介入。引用推文强调：智能体没有被更新，而是被升职了。

key_excerpts.text: Creatify Agent 升级至 Wave 2。AI 智能体现在可通过单次对话完成品牌研究、广告导演，并直接连接 Meta、TikTok 和 Google 三大平台，按指定日期自动发布广告。智能体主导整个流程，仅在策略、脚本、选角等关键节点让营销人员介入。引用推文强调：智能体没有被更新，而是被升职了。

Post Log in Sign up Post 🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog @testingcatalog Creatify Agent can now research a brand, direct the ad, and connect to Meta, TikTok and Google to launch it, all from a single conversation.
The agent leads the work and brings the marketer in at the checkpoints that matter: strategy, scripts, casting.
You watched it make the ad.
Now watch it run the whole campaign.
